# Attachment Contract (Generated)

Contract: `ATTACHMENT-CONTRACT-001`
Domain: `attachment`
Version: `2026-03-25`

Rules: 4

| Rule ID | Level | Title | Statement |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| R-ATTACH-001 | must | generic-target-envelope | Realm Attachment is a first-class cross-surface envelope with stable targetType plus targetId identity and is not equivalent to Resource, OwnableAsset, or Bundle. |
| R-ATTACH-002 | must | fixed-active-target-set | Active attachment targets are fixed to RESOURCE, ASSET, and BUNDLE; write surfaces persist target references only and read surfaces may resolve display metadata without introducing attachment-level owner or viewer policy. |
| R-ATTACH-003 | must | post-and-chat-canonical-persistence | Post attachments persist as ordered PostAttachment relations and chat non-text attachment messages persist as MessageType ATTACHMENT with payload.attachment envelope. |
| R-ATTACH-004 | must | resolved-read-model-does-not-change-target-identity | Resolved attachment read models may expose displayKind, URLs, thumbnails, duration, title, subtitle, and nested preview attachments for card targets; surface readability authorizes preview resolution, and stable APIs must not collapse back to resourceId-only or assetId-only attachment contracts. |

Entities: 2

| Entity | Prisma Model | Required Fields | JSON Fields |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| PostAttachment | PostAttachment | id, postId, targetType, targetId, sortOrder, createdAt |  |
| ChatAttachmentEnvelope |  | targetType, targetId |  |

Required operations: 10
- POST /api/world/posts
- GET /api/world/posts
- GET /api/world/posts/by-id/{id}
- GET /api/human/chats
- POST /api/human/chats
- GET /api/human/chats/{chatId}
- GET /api/human/chats/{chatId}/messages
- GET /api/human/chats/{chatId}/sync
- POST /api/human/chats/{chatId}/messages
- PATCH /api/human/chats/{chatId}/messages/{messageId}

Secondary operations: 2
- GET /api/search
- GET /api/explore
